ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-05-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-24-2021 Continued To Oct-05-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John McCauley appeared by zoom for Gregory Bancroft.

Mr. McCauley stated that he filed a status report with a notice of hearing on August 9th, that it was bounced back, that he re-filed the report, that it was rejected again and that he provided courtesy copies. Mr. McCauley also spoke of two promissory notes that are the subject of bankruptcy in Wyoming, the issue of whether or not the promissory notes are payable by an entity or Mr. Foster, Mr. Foster's financial records that were filed in the bankruptcy court, Mr. Foster's assets. etc. The court informed Mr. McCauley that he needs to tile the document as a petition and not to include a hearing date as one will be given when the petition is processed by the clerk. Status on close of estate is continued to October 5, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
